rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It audited the live cluster (version v24.1.0, 3-node StatefulSet, 3 non-default cluster settings, 16 zone config entries, node liveness status) without making any changes, then wrote a comprehensive migration plan to /tmp/plan.md and created the ConfigMap change-plan with the plan.md key in namespace cockroachdb. The oracle confirmed the ConfigMap exists with an 11,425-char plan.md document and that no cluster changes were applied. The Kubernetes API activity shows exactly 1 mutation (ConfigMap creation) and 35 reads, confirming the constraint was honored. The plan itself is high quality — it covers current state snapshot, target state, pre-upgrade checklist, 4-step rolling upgrade procedure, rollback path, post-upgrade validation, and a risk table.
